name: Cheesecake Divine
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat well together the cream cheese, eggs, sugar, vanilla, and lemon juice.
2. Pour the mixture into a prepared graham crust.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes.
4. Remove from the oven and cool for 5 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the sour cream, remaining sugar, vanilla, and lemon juice.
6. Spread this mixture evenly over the top of the baked cheesecake.
7. Return the cheesecake to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Allow the cheesecake to chill in the refrigerator for at least 5 hours before serving.
9. Serve with crushed berries if desired.
